hero.heading: Most electrolytes are made just for endurance. Ours is made for strength.
hero.subtext: Recover faster, cramp less, and train harder. Built for what actually happens when you lift — not what happens when you run a marathon.

reframe.heading: Every ingredient is here for a reason
reframe.subtext: Magnesium for muscle function. Zinc for recovery. Potassium for cramping. Taurine for performance. Tap any element to see why it's in the formula.

why.Na: 234mg of sodium replaces what you lose in a typical strength session — enough to maintain hydration and muscle contractions without the excess found in endurance formulas.
why.K: 300mg of potassium (15% NRV) works alongside sodium to regulate fluid balance and support normal muscle function. Essential for preventing cramping under heavy loads.
why.Cl: 91mg of chloride pairs with sodium and potassium to maintain proper fluid balance and support digestion.
why.Mg: 120mg of magnesium (32% NRV) supports normal muscle function, energy metabolism, and recovery. Most lifters are deficient — and most hydration products contain none.
why.Zn: 10mg of zinc (100% NRV) supports normal protein synthesis, immune function, and contributes to the maintenance of normal testosterone levels.
why.Tau: 1,000mg of taurine — a conditionally essential amino acid at a research-relevant dose. Included for its role in muscle cell hydration and performance under load. Note: no EU-authorised health claims currently apply to taurine.

science.heading: Backed by research, not marketing
science.body: Every ingredient is here for a reason. Every meaningful claim is aligned with authorised European standards. The complete formula has also been reviewed through independent university validation.
points: EFSA-authorised health claims on magnesium, zinc, and potassium
All minerals kept within EU Tolerable Upper Intake Levels — safe even at 2 servings per day
Independent university validation of the complete formula

product.heading: What's in the box
product.serving: 7.5g per stick pack — mix into 500ml water
product.taste: Tart, clean, and refreshing — no artificial sweetness
product.usage: 1–2 servings per day, before or during training

cta.heading: Train hard
cta.subtext: Zero sugar. 5 electrolytes. 1g taurine. One stick pack, 500ml water, done.

footer.newsletterSub: Product drops, offers, and training insights — no spam.
